ValidationRule.description: Rule restricts users from being able to populate the Lessee field with an account that is not of type 'Airline'
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Lessee_New__c )) && NOT( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Type__c , "Airline")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Lessee must be an Account of type "Airline"
